description_long: This is a tall, ornate stone fountain with a Gothic architectural style, featuring a pointed spire and four vertical columns that frame a central sculpted element. The base is hexagonal and robust, with engraved plaques and decorative moldings. The upper section is highly detailed, with finials and intricate carvings, giving it a historic and monumental appearance. The central area appears to house a small, domed structure, possibly a water outlet or decorative urn. The stone surface is weathered, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. There are no visible water features or active jets in the current state.
description: A tall, Gothic-style stone fountain with ornate carvings, pointed spires, and a hexagonal base, featuring a central sculpted element.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main engraved plaque, central domed feature, and the full height of the spire with detailed carvings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open archway, vertical columns, and the depth of the hexagonal base.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the structural symmetry, spire details, and the layered base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the archway, side engravings, and the weathered stone texture.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain is adorned with Gothic-style pointed spires, finials, and intricate carvings along the upper section. The base features engraved plaques and decorative moldings, while the columns and arches add architectural elegance.
attribute_basin_structure: The base is hexagonal and solid, with no visible open basin or tiered water compartments. The rim is angular and robust, designed more for structural support than for holding water.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible jets or spray patterns are present; the fountain appears inactive or purely ornamental.
